name: Email support agent with AI-powered Gmail replies
description: Fetches new support emails from Gmail, reads FAQ/knowledge data from Google Sheets, uses Claude AI to draft contextual reply suggestions, and posts the draft replies to Slack for review before sending. Adapted from n8n's email support agent with Gemini/GPT fallback workflow.

source.originalName: Email support agent w/ Gemini & GPT fallback using Gmail + Google Sheets

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading support emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for FAQ/knowledge base

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for draft review

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for reviewing draft replies

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query for support emails

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of support emails to process

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID with FAQ/knowledge base

faqRange.description: Sheet range with columns: Question, Answer

code.source:
const messages = $.steps.fetchEmails.response.messages || [];
return { messageIds: messages.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 10) };

steps.name: Fetch full email content for each support message
Read FAQ knowledge base from Google Sheets
Compile emails and FAQ for AI processing
Build Claude prompt for support replies
Run Claude AI support reply generation
Build Slack Block Kit support review dashboard
Post draft replies to Slack for review
